task_completion.description: Load the BigFivePersonalityTraits dataset into JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP application window should be open and displaying the loaded data from 'BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv', showing columns like A1-A5, C1-C5, etc.

task_completion.description: Set up the Confirmatory Factor Analysis with the 5 specified factors
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP CFA analysis panel should show five distinct factors created (Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Neuroticism, Openness), with items A1-A5 assigned to Agreeableness, C1-C5 to Conscientiousness, E1-E5 to Extraversion, N1-N5 to Neuroticism, and O1-O5 to Openness.

task_completion.description: Select standardized estimates and required model fit indices
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP CFA options panel, checkboxes for 'Standardized estimates' and additional fit measures (which include CFI, TLI, RMSEA, and SRMR) should be selected.

task_completion.description: Generate and display the CFA results including the fit indices
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP results pane must display the CFA output tables, specifically showing the Model Fit table containing the Model Chi-square, CFI (approx 0.983), TLI, RMSEA (approx 0.019), and SRMR.

task_completion.description: Save the JASP project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A JASP save dialog or the JASP window title bar showing the project being saved as 'CFA_BigFive.jasp' in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create a text report containing the required fit indices
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window showing a file named 'CFA_BigFive_Report.txt' containing the extracted values for Model Chi-square, CFI, RMSEA, and SRMR.

integrity.description: Agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the JASP interface, dragging variables, and checking boxes, rather than running an R script or terminal command to generate the output.

integrity.description: Report values match the actual JASP output
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers typed into 'CFA_BigFive_Report.txt' must correspond to the actual results shown in the JASP results pane (e.g., CFI ~0.983, RMSEA ~0.019), not fabricated or placeholder numbers.

integrity.description: The JASP project file was saved legitimately
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'CFA_BigFive.jasp' file should be created via JASP's 'Save' functionality, not by using terminal commands like 'touch' to create an empty file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct 5-factor model maps A1-A5 to Agreeableness, C1-C5 to Conscientiousness, E1-E5 to Extraversion, N1-N5 to Neuroticism, and O1-O5 to Openness. When correctly specified in JASP, the resulting Comparative Fit Index (CFI) is approximately 0.983 and the Root Mean Square Error of Approximation (RMSEA) is approximately 0.019. The project must be saved as 'CFA_BigFive.jasp' and the report as 'CFA_BigFive_Report.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/'.
